title: Gamified savings challenges will increase Pro subscription upgrades by 20%
description: We hypothesize that introducing gamified savings challenges (e.g., '30-day savings streak') will convert Deal Hunter personas into Pro subscribers by making the value proposition tangible and habitual.

assumptions.content: Deal Hunters are the highest-potential conversion segment for Pro
Gamification mechanics drive habit formation in food delivery apps
Current Pro trial-to-paid conversion is below 40%

success_signals: Deal Hunter segment Pro adoption increases by 20%
kill_signals: Gamification features show <5% engagement after 2 weeks
Users perceive savings challenges as gimmicky in qualitative research

roster.rationale: Orchestrates the investigation, frames assumptions, produces synthesis

investigation_tracks.question: Are Deal Hunters really the highest-potential Pro conversion segment?

roster.rationale: Explore gamification UX patterns and prototype savings challenge experiences

investigation_tracks.question: What gamification patterns work for savings/loyalty in food delivery?
How do competitors handle loyalty gamification?

roster.rationale: Validate Deal Hunter segment size, current Pro conversion funnel, and baseline metrics

investigation_tracks.question: How large is the Deal Hunter segment and what is their current Pro conversion rate?
What is the current trial-to-paid conversion rate and where do users drop off?

roster.rationale: Assess feasibility of gamification features within existing app architecture

investigation_tracks.question: Can gamification mechanics be built within the existing Pro/Loyalty service architecture?

refinement_history.detail: Added L2a-fintech context for wallet/payment integration with savings challenges
User confirmed framing and assumptions after reviewing context layers
